svg.title: Docker CI/CD workflow with Git, Nexus, AWS ECR
svg.text: git clone · git pull · git branch · git merge · git log
JS app image stored here · aws ecr get-login-password | docker login
all containers talk to each other by container name — no IP needed
git push → docker build → push to Nexus/ECR → docker compose up on EC2 dev server
Next: Jenkins automates this entire flow on every git push 🚀
